description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Starting today, April 1, through June 30, Hanno City Hall is running a social experiment in partnership with the Oku-Musashi Tourism Association. During weekday lunch hours, food trucks and a market will operate on the city hall grounds.

This initiative makes use of public facilities to improve convenience for residents, create new business opportunities for local vendors, and support sustainable city operations.

Food trucks operate almost daily, and the market is held once a week on the main building's wood deck. Different vendors rotate in daily, and the public is welcome to visit.

For details about the program and vendor information, see the link below:

http://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/shisankeieika/13132.html

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13450.html
summary: 📝 Mayor's Update: Food Truck and Market Social Experiment Launches
